svg.title: Illustrative Safe Exec status bar and keybinding guidance
svg.desc: An illustrative SVG mockup showing the Safe Exec status bar item, the main command palette menu, and recommended proxy keybindings. It is not a real VS Code screenshot.

text.font-family: IBM Plex Sans, Segoe UI, Arial, sans-serif
